title: Leisure Isle Bridge Club marks 25 years
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Leisure Island Bridge Club...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Leisure Island Bridge Club marked a major milestone on 4 September, celebrating its 25th anniversary with a special card game and gathering at the Leisure Isle Bowling Club.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Leisure Island Bridge Club marked a major milestone on 4 September, celebrating its 25th anniversary with a special card game and gathering at the Leisure Isle Bowling Club."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Members came together for a memorable day of friendly competition, delicious treats, and a celebration of the club's journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Founder Pam Koen delivered a moving speech, reflecting on the club's humble beginnings and the enduring friendships that have flourished around the bridge table over the past quarter century.","html":"Founder Pam Koen delivered a moving speech, reflecting on the club's humble beginnings and the enduring friendships that have flourished around the bridge table over the past quarter century."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Laughter, shared stories, and friendship filled the room, highlighting the strong sense of community that has defined the club since its inception."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Organisers described the anniversary not only as a reflection of the past but also a celebration of the future. Treasurer and scorer Lindsay Durham expressed pride in the club's achievements, particularly in remaining relevant through changing times and challenges such as the Covid-19 pandemic.","html":"Organisers described the anniversary not only as a reflection of the past but also a celebration of the future. Treasurer and scorer Lindsay Durham expressed pride in the club's achievements, particularly in remaining relevant through changing times and challenges such as the Covid-19 pandemic."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We're always looking for new members,\" said Durham. \"Come with a partner and you're guaranteed a game. It costs just R20 to play, and that includes tea or coffee and two delicious cream biscuits. Turning 25 is really something to brag about, and all new players are welcome!\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The club boasts around 250 past and present members and maintains a strong weekly turnout. It is affiliated with the English Bridge Union (EBU), and scoring is done to EBU standards. As a duplicate bridge club, it meets every Thursday at the Leisure Island Country Club.","html":"The club boasts around 250 past and present members and maintains a strong weekly turnout. It is affiliated with the English Bridge Union (EBU), and scoring is done to EBU standards. As a duplicate bridge club, it meets every Thursday at the Leisure Island Country Club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the cards were dealt and the games began, the day stood as a celebration of bridge, friendships and community built over 25 years - with many more still to come.","html":"As the cards were dealt and the games began, the day stood as a celebration of bridge, friendships and community built over 25 years - with many more still to come."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Leisure Island Bridge Club founders Bobby Mowatt (left) and Pam Koen (right).","html":"Leisure Island Bridge Club founders Bobby Mowatt (left) and Pam Koen (right)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The bridge club members participated in a friendly competition. Photo: Rozano Alie","html":"The bridge club members participated in a friendly competition. Photo: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
